languages.text: "Довольно притворства". {n}Ювенна гордо расправляет плечи.{/n} "Я не стану ни отрицать своих поступков, ни каяться в них. Если вы погрязли в ереси настолько, что готовы последовать в пламя вслед за еретиком — пусть. Однажды я увижу, как инквизитор Диодас подвергнет аутодафе тебя, сестра, и тебя, предатель".

traits.locale_text: "Довольно притворства". {n}Ювенна гордо расправляет плечи.{/n} "Я не стану ни отрицать своих поступков, ни каяться в них. Если вы погрязли в ереси настолько, что готовы последовать в пламя вслед за еретиком — пусть. Однажды я увижу, как инквизитор Диодас подвергнет аутодафе тебя, сестра, и тебя, предатель".
traits.speaker: JuvennaVonValancius

languages.text: "Enough with the pretence." {n}Juvenna throws back her shoulders proudly.{/n} "I will neither deny my deeds nor repent of them. If you are so mired in heresy that you are willing to follow a heretic into the flames, so be it. One day I will see you, sister, and you, traitor, burn for your crimes at the hands of Inquisitor af Irramon."
languages.original_text: "Довольно притворства". {n}Ювенна гордо расправляет плечи.{/n} "Я не стану ни отрицать своих поступков, ни каяться в них. Если вы погрязли в ереси настолько, что готовы последовать в пламя вслед за еретиком — пусть. Однажды я увижу, как инквизитор Диодас подвергнет аутодафе тебя, сестра, и тебя, предатель".

If you are so mired in heresy that you are willing to follow a heretic into the flames, so be it. One day I will see you, sister, and you, traitor, burn for your crimes at the hands of Inquisitor af Irramon."

"Enough with the pretence." {n}Juvenna throws back her shoulders proudly.{/n} "I will neither deny my deeds nor repent of them. If you are so mired in heresy that you are willing to follow a heretic into the flames, so be it. One day I will see you, sister, and you, traitor, burn for your crimes at the hands of Inquisitor af Irramon."

"Enough with the pretence." {n}Juvenna throws back her shoulders proudly.{/n} "I will neither deny my deeds nor repent of them. If you are so mired in heresy that you are willing to follow a heretic into the flames, so be it. One day I will see you, sister, and you, traitor, burn for your crimes at the hands of Inquisitor af Irramon."

languages.text: “那我也不装了。”{n}尤文娜抬头挺胸，一副骄傲的模样。{/n}“我既不会否认我的所作所为，也不会为此忏悔。既然你们已深陷异端泥潭，甘愿追随一个异端分子跳进火海，那就随你们吧。总有一天，我会亲眼看着你，我的姐妹，还有你这个叛徒，在审判官阿夫·伊拉蒙的手中被焚为灰烬，为你们的罪行付出代价。”
languages.original_text: "Enough with the pretence." {n}Juvenna throws back her shoulders proudly.{/n} "I will neither deny my deeds nor repent of them. If you are so mired in heresy that you are willing to follow a heretic into the flames, so be it. One day I will see you, sister, and you, traitor, burn for your crimes at the hands of Inquisitor af Irramon."

traits.locale_text: “那我也不装了。”{n}尤文娜抬头挺胸，一副骄傲的模样。{/n}“我既不会否认我的所作所为，也不会为此忏悔。既然你们已深陷异端泥潭，甘愿追随一个异端分子跳进火海，那就随你们吧。总有一天，我会亲眼看着你，我的姐妹，还有你这个叛徒，在审判官阿夫·伊拉蒙的手中被焚为灰烬，为你们的罪行付出代价。”

languages.text: {n}Juvenna redresse fièrement les épaules.{/n} « Inutile de continuer ces faux-semblants. Je ne nierai pas ce que j'ai fait et je ne m'en repentirai pas non plus. Si vous vous êtes laissé corrompre à ce point que vous êtes {mf|prêts|prêtes} à suivre un hérétique dans les flammes, je m'incline. Mais un jour, ma sœur, toi et {mf|ce traître|cette traîtresse} brûlerez pour vos crimes aux mains de l'inquisiteur af Irramon. »
languages.original_text: "Enough with the pretence." {n}Juvenna throws back her shoulders proudly.{/n} "I will neither deny my deeds nor repent of them. If you are so mired in heresy that you are willing to follow a heretic into the flames, so be it. One day I will see you, sister, and you, traitor, burn for your crimes at the hands of Inquisitor af Irramon."

traits.locale_text: {n}Juvenna redresse fièrement les épaules.{/n} « Inutile de continuer ces faux-semblants. Je ne nierai pas ce que j'ai fait et je ne m'en repentirai pas non plus. Si vous vous êtes laissé corrompre à ce point que vous êtes {mf|prêts|prêtes} à suivre un hérétique dans les flammes, je m'incline. Mais un jour, ma sœur, toi et {mf|ce traître|cette traîtresse} brûlerez pour vos crimes aux mains de l'inquisiteur af Irramon. »

languages.text: "Rol yapmak anlamsız." {n}Juvenna, gururla omuzlarını silkerek geriye atıyor.{/n} "Ne yaptıklarımı inkâr edeceğim ne de tövbe edeceğim. Bir kâfirin peşinden alevlere girmeye istekli olacak kadar kâfirliğe battıysan öyle olsun. Bir gün senin kardeşim... Bir de senin hain Engizisyoncu af İrramon, işlediğiniz suçlar için yandığınızı göreceğim."
languages.original_text: "Enough with the pretence." {n}Juvenna throws back her shoulders proudly.{/n} "I will neither deny my deeds nor repent of them. If you are so mired in heresy that you are willing to follow a heretic into the flames, so be it. One day I will see you, sister, and you, traitor, burn for your crimes at the hands of Inquisitor af Irramon."

traits.locale_text: "Rol yapmak anlamsız." {n}Juvenna, gururla omuzlarını silkerek geriye atıyor.{/n} "Ne yaptıklarımı inkâr edeceğim ne de tövbe edeceğim. Bir kâfirin peşinden alevlere girmeye istekli olacak kadar kâfirliğe battıysan öyle olsun. Bir gün senin kardeşim... Bir de senin hain Engizisyoncu af İrramon, işlediğiniz suçlar için yandığınızı göreceğim."

languages.text: «Basta de fingir». {n}Juvenna saca pecho con orgullo.{/n} «No pienso negar mis actos ni arrepentirme de ellos. Si están tan sumid{mf|o|a}s en la herejía como para seguir a ese hereje a la hoguera, que así sea. Algún día te veré arder por tus crímenes, hermana, y a ti, traidor{mf||a}, a manos del Inquisidor af Irramon».
languages.original_text: "Enough with the pretence." {n}Juvenna throws back her shoulders proudly.{/n} "I will neither deny my deeds nor repent of them. If you are so mired in heresy that you are willing to follow a heretic into the flames, so be it. One day I will see you, sister, and you, traitor, burn for your crimes at the hands of Inquisitor af Irramon."

traits.locale_text: «Basta de fingir». {n}Juvenna saca pecho con orgullo.{/n} «No pienso negar mis actos ni arrepentirme de ellos. Si están tan sumid{mf|o|a}s en la herejía como para seguir a ese hereje a la hoguera, que así sea. Algún día te veré arder por tus crímenes, hermana, y a ti, traidor{mf||a}, a manos del Inquisidor af Irramon».

languages.text: "Schluss mit der Heuchelei." {n}Juvenna wirft sich stolz in die Brust.{/n} "Ich werde meine Taten nicht leugnen und bereue sie auch nicht. Wenn Ihr so in Ketzerei versunken seid, dass Ihr einem Ketzer in die Flammen folgt, von mir aus. Eines Tages werdet Ihr, Schwester, und Ihr für Eure Verbrechen durch die Hand von Inquisitor af Irramon brennen."
languages.original_text: "Enough with the pretence." {n}Juvenna throws back her shoulders proudly.{/n} "I will neither deny my deeds nor repent of them. If you are so mired in heresy that you are willing to follow a heretic into the flames, so be it. One day I will see you, sister, and you, traitor, burn for your crimes at the hands of Inquisitor af Irramon."

traits.locale_text: "Schluss mit der Heuchelei." {n}Juvenna wirft sich stolz in die Brust.{/n} "Ich werde meine Taten nicht leugnen und bereue sie auch nicht. Wenn Ihr so in Ketzerei versunken seid, dass Ihr einem Ketzer in die Flammen folgt, von mir aus. Eines Tages werdet Ihr, Schwester, und Ihr für Eure Verbrechen durch die Hand von Inquisitor af Irramon brennen."

languages.text: 「偽りの終わりだ」{n}ジュベナは誇らしげに肩をすくめた。{/n}「私の行為を否定するも、悔い改めるも無い。あなたが異端の泥にまみれて異端者と共に炎に飛び込むなら、そうしよう。いつか私は、あなた、そして裏切り者、両方をインキジター・ア・イルラモンの手に、罪を犯した者として焼き尽くすのを見届けるだろう」
languages.original_text: "Enough with the pretence." {n}Juvenna throws back her shoulders proudly.{/n} "I will neither deny my deeds nor repent of them. If you are so mired in heresy that you are willing to follow a heretic into the flames, so be it. One day I will see you, sister, and you, traitor, burn for your crimes at the hands of Inquisitor af Irramon."

traits.locale_text: 「偽りの終わりだ」{n}ジュベナは誇らしげに肩をすくめた。{/n}「私の行為を否定するも、悔い改めるも無い。あなたが異端の泥にまみれて異端者と共に炎に飛び込むなら、そうしよう。いつか私は、あなた、そして裏切り者、両方をインキジター・ア・イルラモンの手に、罪を犯した者として焼き尽くすのを見届けるだろう」
